metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated contemporary music skills through performance, composition, and production. This course emphasizes professional-level musicianship, artistic development, and preparation for music careers or advanced study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced contemporary music course for professional-level performance and production.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced contemporary musicians demonstrate professional-level musicianship and artistic sophistication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 musicians perform with technical excellence and artistic maturity, creating work that engages audiences and contributes to musical discourse.

big_ideas.statement: Professional contemporary music production requires both artistic vision and technical expertise.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students understand music production at professional standards, integrating artistic concepts with technical sophistication.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced contemporary music reflects personal artistic voice and engages with cultural and social contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 musicians create work expressing distinctive perspectives and engaging with meaningful cultural and contemporary themes.

big_ideas.statement: Professional contemporary music practice positions students for music careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios, networks, and skills necessary for careers in music or continued education.

competencies.raw: Perform contemporary music at professional level
i_can_statements: I can perform with technical precision and artistic expression
I can execute demanding contemporary music repertoire
I can maintain professional performance standards
I can perform in diverse contemporary styles

competencies.raw: Create sophisticated original compositions and arrangements
i_can_statements: I can compose original works of substantial length and complexity
I can arrange music creatively for various configurations
I can incorporate diverse influences in my compositions
I can realize artistic vision through original work

competencies.raw: Master professional music production and recording
i_can_statements: I can produce professional-quality recordings
I can operate professional audio equipment and software
I can mix and master recordings effectively
I can achieve professional production standards

competencies.raw: Explore sophisticated sound design and music technology
i_can_statements: I can manipulate and design sounds creatively
I can integrate emerging technologies into my music
I can experiment with unconventional sound sources
I can develop distinctive sonic aesthetic

competencies.raw: Analyze contemporary music with sophisticated frameworks
i_can_statements: I can analyze production techniques and compositional structures
I can understand music within cultural and historical contexts
I can recognize artistic sophistication and innovation
I can evaluate music against professional standards

competencies.raw: Understand music production at professional level
i_can_statements: I can explain professional recording and production practices
I can evaluate technical and artistic production choices
I can understand music industry standards and practices
I can recognize professional production quality

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic growth and professional readiness
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my development as a musician and producer
I can articulate my musical style and artistic vision
I can assess readiness for professional music work
I can envision music as career or lifelong practice

competencies.raw: Engage with music as cultural and social expression
i_can_statements: I can understand music's role in cultural expression
I can recognize diverse musical perspectives and traditions
I can analyze music's social and political dimensions
I can participate in musical discourse and communities

competencies.raw: Create professional recordings and musical documentation
i_can_statements: I can produce professional-quality recordings of my music
I can document my creative process
I can organize and archive musical work
I can create professional-quality media

competencies.raw: Share music through performance and recording
i_can_statements: I can perform my music for audiences
I can distribute music through digital platforms
I can promote my work effectively
I can build audience engagement

competencies.raw: Communicate about music and artistic choices
i_can_statements: I can articulate my artistic vision and process
I can discuss musical and production choices
I can write liner notes and artist statements
I can participate in music discussions and interviews

competencies.raw: Communicate through music and artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can express complex ideas and emotions through music
I can create music that resonates with audiences
I can engage audiences with my artistic work
I can develop distinctive artistic voice

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse musical traditions and global music
i_can_statements: I can incorporate diverse musical influences
I can respect and learn from global traditions
I can create fusion work respectfully
I can appreciate music from diverse cultures

competencies.raw: Explore emerging musical trends and innovation
i_can_statements: I can stay informed about music industry developments
I can experiment with new techniques and approaches
I can participate in contemporary musical movements
I can develop work at edge of contemporary practice

competencies.raw: Develop professional presence and career pathways
i_can_statements: I can create professional portfolio and showreel
I can establish presence in music industry
I can build professional networks and relationships
I can understand music careers and opportunities

competencies.raw: Prepare for lifelong musical practice and career
i_can_statements: I can envision music as lifetime practice
I can plan for continued musical development
I can understand sustainability in music careers
I can commit to artistic growth and musical practice

areas.name: Composition and Arranging at Professional Level
areas.raw: Composition and Arranging at Professional Level

areas.name: Professional Music Industry and Career Development
areas.raw: Professional Music Industry and Career Development
